testcase.name: dirty corpus inspector primary hierarchy hides raw feed payloads and provenance
Inspector primary body hides screenshot-family raw source, navigation, and diagnostic garbage
ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair expected-red browser contract › ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair: SOURCE LEDGER real click opens ledger with active-state proof and obstruction diagnostics
ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair expected-red browser contract › ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair: TODAY click after another panel restores Today as the only active primary surface
ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair expected-red browser contract › ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair: selected feed row hover remains restrained instead of stacking ambiguous active hover blocks

ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair expected-red browser contract › ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair: default Inspector primary area is structured reading content, not raw JSON-LD/extracted metadata
ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair expected-red browser contract › ui-navigation-hover-inspector-repair: primary visible copy avoids forbidden RSS-reader/SaaS/onboarding language
